name: @momentiq/dark-factory-workspace
description: Workspaces shell for the public Momentiq CLIs — @momentiq/dark-factory-cli, @momentiq/dark-factory-schemas, @momentiq/sage-cli.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@momentiq/dark-factory-schemas && npm run build --workspace=@momentiq/dark-factory-cli && npm run build --workspace=@momentiq/sage-cli
scripts.type-check: npm run type-check --workspace=@momentiq/dark-factory-schemas && npm run type-check --workspace=@momentiq/dark-factory-cli && npm run type-check --workspace=@momentiq/sage-cli
scripts.test: npm test --workspace=@momentiq/dark-factory-schemas && npm test --workspace=@momentiq/dark-factory-cli && npm test --workspace=@momentiq/sage-cli
